## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss prioritization and qualification of potential customers for GrowthX's AI-powered content creation service.](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on signing well-aligned, urgent clients with clear needs; avoid those lacking certainty or internal alignment](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Maintain a 4-6 week booking window to ensure quality; use this as a filter for serious clients](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Prioritize larger, well-funded companies (Series B+) in spaces where GrowthX can succeed](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [For early-stage startups, suggest alternatives (e.g., future community offerings) or defer engagement](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

## Topics

### Client Prioritization Strategy

  - [Prioritize clients based on alignment, urgency, and clear need for GrowthX's services](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Red flags: lack of certainty, internal misalignment, existing adequate solutions](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Example: Ceros may lack full alignment and urgency; okay to let drag or drop for now](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Maintain 4-6 week booking window; use as natural filter for serious clients](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Be cautious with early-stage startups (e.g., BlackSoul.ai); suggest alternatives or defer](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Current Pipeline and Booking Status

  - [Fully booked through October 20th (including reserved spot for AirByte)](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [October 27th: Two contracts out (TrueLook, Attention.com), Redis ready to sign](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Upcoming potential clients: Aredis, Aceros](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Some deals (e.g., Tavis, Viscom) can be "slow burned" due to lack of urgency](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)

### Handling Different Client Types

  - [Larger clients (e.g., Cresta): Let self-select out in procurement if terms don't align](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Early-stage startups: Be upfront about fit, suggest waiting for self-serve platform](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Special cases (investor intros, personal relationships): Navigate carefully to avoid burning bridges](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

### Marcel's Involvement and Workload

  - [Marcel experiencing burnout (avg. 50 meetings/week for 3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Setting meeting budget: 8-10 hours of external meetings per week](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Tyler to take over more intro calls and follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Reserve Marcel for high-priority logos (e.g., Zapier, Lovable) and sensitive relationships (e.g., Brex)](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to continue reviewing and approving client targets with Bridget and George weekly](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Implement more stringent filtering for early-stage startups and misaligned clients](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Tyler to take over more intro calls and follow-ups, freeing up Marcel's time](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Plan Marcel's involvement 1-2 weeks in advance, respecting new meeting budget](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Navigate carefully with investor introductions and personal relationships](https://fathom.video/share/rzbDqigmbzZgxjCmbH_VMgDbrNiahm-8?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
